headline: Super vs ChatGPT — Choosing a Personal AI Agent for Real Computer Work

site_brief.goal: Create a fair but persuasive competitor comparison page for Super vs ChatGPT. Use supplied sources for current facts, avoid fake claims, and make the practical argument that Super is better suited for repeated computer-use work because its cache can lower repeated execution cost. Include a long-form buyer guide with a decision matrix, migration checklist, how-to evaluation plan, and source-backed caveats.
site_brief.title: Super vs ChatGPT

summary: A fair, source-backed comparison for people deciding between ChatGPT and Super. ChatGPT remains a best‑in‑class general AI assistant evolving toward agents. Super is positioned for repeated, durable computer‑use workflows through its reusable computer-use cache. This page includes a long‑form buyer guide, workflow evaluation plan, risks, FAQs, and cited market context across Gemini, Grok, Siri, Folk, and Orchids.
